history.content:
<thought>
I am at cell row 02 column B facing right (`>`). The goal is at row 04 column D. Moving forward twice will take me to column D, row 02. However, the lava cells are at C3 and C4, so moving directly down from column D to row 4 is safe. I will move forward first to column C, row 2.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am now at row 02 column C facing right (`>`). The goal is at row 04 column D. Moving forward once will take me to row 2 column D, which is safe. I will continue moving forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column D facing right (`>`). The goal is at row 04 column D, so I need to move down two rows. To do that, I need to turn downwards (facing `v`). From facing right, turning right once will make me face down (`v`).
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column D facing down (`v`). The cell immediately ahead at row 03 column D is safe floor ('.'). I can move forward safely.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column D facing down (`v`). The cell below at row 04 column D contains the goal `G`. I should move forward to reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
